name: ttdobjectspy
description: TTDObjectsPy plugin bundling a TTD analysis skill and the local TTDObjectsPy MCP server for Microsoft Time Travel Debugging trace work on Windows.

interface.shortDescription: Analyze Windows TTD traces with a bundled MCP server
interface.longDescription: Bring TTDObjectsPy into Codex with a bundled MCP server and a workflow-heavy skill for capturing traces, orienting a session quickly, tracing values backward and forward, and answering crash, malware, CTF, and general reverse-engineering questions from real TTD recordings.
defaultPrompt: Open this .run trace, orient the session, and trace the interesting behavior back to its source.
